sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a cold onset approximately one week ago, with associated post-nasal drip and congestion. He denies fever, shortness of breath, or chest pain. He reports receiving both COVID-19 vaccines and is unsure if anyone else in his household is sick. He reports no muscle aches related to his statin medication.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's oxygenation is 96%. Cervical lymphadenopathy is present. Lipid panel shows cholesterol is generally good. The COVID-19 test result is positive. Lung auscultation reveals bilateral rhonchi and some wheezing.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a positive COVID-19 test and is experiencing upper respiratory symptoms. He has a history of coronary artery bypass grafting and controlled coronary artery disease.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Continue Crestor 20 mg daily. Order a repeat lipid panel in six months. Follow up if symptoms worsen.
